title: Mixing Valve Controller
description:
The function block Mixing Valve Controller can be used to control common mixing valve types.
This makes it possible to control the flow temperature in heating systems or similar applications in ventilation and air conditioning systems.

inputs.description: Disables input (ϑt) when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning)

outputs.description: Active when difference between current and target temperature exceeds 5°C/9°F for longer than 10 minutes. Error timer is reset and suspended for 15 minutes by reference drive, target temperature adaption or a change at input Off.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Sampling period of controller in seconds. New values for (V), (O) and (C) are calculated by the controller at this time interval.
Controller gain in %, where Kp% = Kp * 100.
Integral part of the controller in %, where Ki% = Ki * 100.
0 = normal, 1 = inverted (for cooling: mixer opens as the temperature rises)
Maximum actuator standstill in days. If the valves have not operated in set time, they will be moved automatically. Time should be set as specified by the manufacturer! 0 = function is disabled.

properties.description: If this box is ticked, an error message will be sent from this input via the mailer and the system status.
